creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #9)

I think this can safely be closed. I believe I was using the builtin trackpad with no changes by 12.2-RELEASE. 

Unfortunately, that laptop has been repurposed to non-FreeBSD things, so I can't check it anymore, but I believe it was working through at least 13.2-RELEASE and I don't think much has changed that would break it.

I'm happy to have this closed if possible.
